title: 4Pcs Twist Knot Wire Wheel Cup Brush Set for 4-1/2" Angle Grinder, M14 Threaded Arbor - Coarse Knotted Wire Wheels for Heavy Duty Rust Stripping, Paint Removal & Multi-Surface Cleaning (φ75mm φ100mm)
features: 4-Pack Multi-Size Set: Includes 2x 3 inch (75mm) + 2x 4 inch (100mm) coarse twisted knotted brushes. Fits 4 1/2" angle grinders with M14 arbor, ideal for industrial, automotive, and woodworking tasks—saves time on repetitive stripping, cleaning, and abrasion.

Knot Wrap Design: Unique twist knot construction enables heavy-duty rust/paint removal on metal (steel/iron) and wood surfaces, minimizing scratch risk. Perfect for weld edge cleaning, deburring, and blending rough edges.

Premium 0.5mm Carbon Steel: Built with high-strength 0.020" carbon steel wires and precision-balanced design, offering 4x longer durability than standard brushes. Smooth operation at 12,500 RPM reduces vibration for safer, consistent performance. Reinforced Structure for High-Speed

Stability: Thickened steel inner/outer plates and M14 threaded arbor prevent wire detachment under pressure. Withstands heavy-duty tasks like rust stripping, scale removal, and edge blending with minimal wear.

Effortless Deburring & Surface Prep: Quickly removes rust, weld spatter, paint, and scale from metal/wood surfaces. Streamlines prep work for painting, welding, or finishing—suitable for both professional workshops and DIY projects.
